title: Vacancy for Teacher at Coursera India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Coursera India
jsonLd.description:
Coursera India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Coursera India:
Coursera India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
